_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Contractor'S Risk Management Plan
summary: The Contractor's Risk Management Plan monitors management, cost, and schedule of contract efforts related to a system and equipment, providing government with risk data for all associated risks.
use_relationship: The Contractor's Risk Management Plan will be used to monitor management, cost and schedule of the contract efforts relative to a system and equipment. This information will provide the government with risk data for all risks associated with the system/equipment. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and preparation instructions for the data product resulting from the work task specified in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Format
preparation_instructions.content: The plan shall be in contractor's format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content
preparation_instructions.content: The plan shall contain a cover and title page identifying the following:

children.title: Plan document number/revision number or letter.
Revision Control
children.content: The plan shall contain a list of all revisions identifying the following information:

children.title: Table of Contents
children.content: The table of contents shall identify each major section title, paragraph number, and starting page number for each major section.

children.title: Contents
children.content: The plan shall address in depth each major section identified below:

children.title: Media requirements
children.content: The plan shall be presented in electronic format MS Word version 2003-2007.
